name: Agent/工具缺少GuardrailProvider安全守卫

source_vulnerability.description: crewAI GuardrailProvider 讨论：agent 定义中缺少 guardrail 配置，导致 tool 调用无强制执行的安全策略。safal207 的 GuardrailDecisionV1 spec 要求 decision_id = SHA-256(compact sorted JSON(claims))，expires_at 必须在 hash preimage 内。分离 GuardrailDecisionV1（执行前授权）vs ActionEnvelopeV1（执行后证据）

constraints.matched_when: MCPToolHandler 有 side-effect 操作但无 GuardrailProvider 配置。GuardrailDecisionV1 要求每笔带授权的 tool 调用必须生成 decision_id（content-addressed hash），expires_at 必须在 preimage 内，且区分执行前授权（GuardrailDecisionV1）和执行后证据（ActionEnvelopeV1）

remediation: Add GuardrailProvider to agent definition: 1) Implement GuardrailDecisionV1 with decision_id=SHA-256(canonical_json(claims)), 2) Include expires_at in hash preimage to prevent tampering, 3) Separate pre-execution authorization (GuardrailDecisionV1) from post-execution evidence (ActionEnvelopeV1), 4) Use CKG (Constraint Knowledge Graph) for declarative authorization instead of imperative logic. Reference: crewAI#4877 converged spec by safal207, babyblueviper1, Yarmoluk.
